Suberogatory actions are actions below good conduct but not prohibited

Known as makrooh in Fiqh

Casual sex may be suberogatory{{Efn|This is up for serious debate see [[a new theory of sex]]}} but it is definitely not [[Prohibitions|Prohibited]]

[[Category:Ethics]]
[[sn:Suberogatory]]==See Also==
* [[supererogatory]]
==References==
{{notelist}}
[[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Suberogatory]][[sn:Suberogatory]]<references group="lower-alpha"/>
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
